title: Junior Instructional Designer at T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions:
T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions!
